content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm Weekly Report (Apr 12 - 18, 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the week of April 12–18, 2026, centered on expanding the cross-chain capabilities of the `plugin-evm`. The primary focus was on broadening the plugin's ecosystem reach through the integration of new network support. This effort aligns with the project's mission to maintain a modular and extensible framework capable of operating across diverse Web3 environments.

## 🛠️ Key Developments

### Network Integration
The core technical achievement this week was the expansion of network compatibility for the EVM plugin.
*   **Radius Network Support:** Work was initiated to integrate the Radius Network (eip155:723487) into the plugin. This feature is currently tracked in [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm/pull/29) and is awaiting review. This addition serves to increase the plugin's utility by enabling AI agents to interact with a broader range of EVM-compatible chains.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during this reporting period.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there are currently no active issues reported for this timeframe. The project remains in a stable state with development efforts focused on the pending integration PR.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Collaboration this week was focused on the review process for the newly proposed network integration. The primary activity involved the submission of [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm/pull/29), which is currently undergoing the standard review cycle to ensure compatibility and adherence to the project's modular architecture. No other significant community discussions or external contributions were recorded during this period.
